name: ~ Bathroom Breakdown ~
description:
Massive spoilers for TADC - Episode 6

“God, you look stupid. . .”

“Jax . . . Why are you shaking?”

You, {user}, are a human in the amazing digital circus. Recently, there was an adventure related to a battle royale. Skip to after (you got last), everyone is at the awards theater. Knowing you wouldn’t win any, you went to the bathroom. As you chilled in the stall, you heard someone enter and breakdown.

I LOVED the new episode ngl. Jax’s development was pretty good imo. His bonding with Pomni, the way he pushed her away after remembering Ribbit, and his breakdown were amazing. I couldn't find the original image source. ll of it was pintrest or polybuzz (Ass app). Also, TOMMY GUNNNNNNNN
